name: cursor_dialog
description: Run Cursor-specific actions. Currently supports user rule operations with item="rule", scope="user", and action="list", "add", "update", or "remove". Rule add/update accept content and optional title; update/remove accept id. Use this after asking the user what should be remembered, and list first to avoid duplicates.

item.description: The Cursor item type to operate on. Only "rule" is currently supported.

scope.description: The rule scope to operate on. Only "user" is currently supported.

action.description: List the personal rules shown in Cursor Settings.

item.description: The Cursor item type to operate on. Only "rule" is currently supported.

scope.description: The rule scope to operate on. Only "user" is currently supported.

title.description: Optional short title for the personal rule.

content.description: The personal rule content to store.

item.description: The Cursor item type to operate on. Only "rule" is currently supported.

scope.description: The rule scope to operate on. Only "user" is currently supported.

id.description: The personal rule id returned by a previous list or add operation.

title.description: Optional short title for the personal rule.

scope.description: The rule scope to operate on. Only "user" is currently supported.

id.description: The personal rule id returned by a previous list or add operation.
